title: Librarian provides:overlap drift allowlist
description: Validates ${CLAUDE_HOME}/hooks/config/drift-allowlist.json — the source-of-truth for librarian provides:overlap exemptions. Edited directly by adopters; mirrored into librarian-manifest.json at /librarian run time. Hand-editing the manifest is forbidden (per feedback_manifest_no_hand_edit). Authored by Plan 81 SP01 Session 16 (2026-05-10).

_schema_version.description: Optional schema version pin. Foundation skeleton omits; future migrations may add.

provides_overlap.description: Exemption entries. Each entry declares an overlap that should NOT be flagged as drift by /librarian. Foundation skeleton ships an empty array.

skill.description: Skill or capability name claiming the provides label.

label.description: The provides label whose overlap is exempted.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale. Surfaced in librarian audit reports.
